creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174905
switch to USE_GITHUB

In r422140 audio/libofa was marked BROKEN, as GOOGLE_CODE has gone swimming with the fishes. 

The project is available on github via tanob/libofa [1]. It seems the to be the best thing I could find at the moment. 


The attached patch fetches from the intial commit made into the repo, which according to `diff -ruN libofa-git libofa-0.9.3` is identical to the sources
in the tarball used previously.


[1] https://github.com/tanob/libofa
